parameters.query: SELECT ar.id AS rule_id, ar.tenant_slug, ar.action_type, ar.action_config, b.customer_phone AS phone, b.customer_name, s.name AS service_name, b.start_time, wt.phone_number_id FROM wa_automation_rules ar JOIN tenants t ON t.slug = ar.tenant_slug JOIN wa_tenant_config wt ON wt.tenant_slug = ar.tenant_slug JOIN bookings b ON b.tenant_id = t.id LEFT JOIN services s ON s.id = b.service_id WHERE ar.trigger_event = 'booking_confirmed' AND ar.enabled = true AND b.status = 'confirmed' AND b.created_at >= NOW() - interval '65 minutes' AND b.created_at >= NOW() - interval '65 minutes' - ((ar.action_config->>'delayMinutes')::int * interval '1 minute') AND b.customer_phone IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_messages wm WHERE wm.numero = b.customer_phone AND wm.metadata->>'rule_id' = ar.id::text AND wm.created_at >= b.created_at) LIMIT 20

SELECT ar.id AS rule_id, ar.tenant_slug, ar.action_type, ar.action_config, c.phone, c.first_name AS customer_name, wt.phone_number_id FROM wa_automation_rules ar JOIN tenants t ON t.slug = ar.tenant_slug JOIN wa_tenant_config wt ON wt.tenant_slug = ar.tenant_slug JOIN customers c ON c.tenant_id = t.id WHERE ar.trigger_event = 'customer_inactive_30d' AND ar.enabled = true AND c.phone IS NOT NULL AND (c.last_visit_at IS NULL OR c.last_visit_at < NOW() - interval '30 days') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_messages wm WHERE wm.numero = c.phone AND wm.metadata->>'rule_id' = ar.id::text AND wm.created_at >= NOW() - interval '31 days') LIMIT 20

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $json.phone, type: 'text', text: { body: $json.resolvedMessage } }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO whatsapp_messages (mensaje_id, numero, contenido, tipo, direccion, estado, metadata) VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, '{{ $json.phone }}', '{{ $json.resolvedMessage }}', 'text', 'outbound', 'sent', '{"rule_id": "{{ $json.rule_id }}", "automation": true}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
